assumptions: The developer has a supported browser and can receive email when the selected route requires it.
No platform account, tenant, credentials, or product resources exist yet.
Developer has internet access and a supported modern browser
Developer has a domain to use for sending email messages

developer_goal: Create a Customer.io account and workspace to start sending automated messages to people.

first_success.outcome: A message is successfully sent to a test person added to the workspace, triggered by a campaign
first_success.observable_signal: Test person receives the message sent from the campaign

route_selection.rule: Reconstruct complete official candidate routes, prefer no payment/admin/approval when possible, then minimize required actions; leave consequential ties unresolved.

candidates.name: API
candidates.reason: APIs are used for integration and data ingestion but initial onboarding and first success is documented via the web console.

candidates.name: CLI or SDK
candidates.reason: SDKs and client libraries support integration but onboarding steps focus on web console usage.

required_path.action: Create a Customer.io account and workspace

required_fields.label: Account registration details
required_fields.notes: Mapped from machine-drafted primary_path; field inventory not independently audited.

required_path.observable_result: Workspace is created and accessible in the dashboard

required_path.action: Set up email channel by entering domain and from address, then verify domain ownership

required_fields.label: Domain name, email addresses, DNS records
required_fields.notes: Mapped from machine-drafted primary_path; field inventory not independently audited.

required_path.action: Add a test person to the workspace

required_fields.label: Person identifier and attributes
required_fields.notes: Mapped from machine-drafted primary_path; field inventory not independently audited.

required_path.action: Create a campaign to send a message to the test person

required_fields.label: Campaign settings, segment criteria, message content
required_fields.notes: Mapped from machine-drafted primary_path; field inventory not independently audited.

required_path.observable_result: Campaign triggers and sends message to test person

required_path.action: Send message to test person triggered by campaign

required_fields.label: Active campaign and test person in segment
required_fields.notes: Mapped from machine-drafted primary_path; field inventory not independently audited.

required_path.observable_result: Message delivery confirmation or receipt by test person

prerequisites.description: Create a Customer.io account and workspace
Have a domain to configure for sending email messages
Configure email channel with domain, from address, and verify domain ownership
Understand basic messaging concepts and data model (people, attributes, events)

external_gates.description: Must create a Customer.io account and workspace to proceed
Must have a domain and verify ownership to send email messages
Must configure email channel with domain and from address, including DNS records

platform_outcomes.description: Send your first message to a test person via a campaign

sources.title: Quick start guide | Customer.io Docs
evidence_supported: Add a test person to your workspace

uncertainties.question: What is the typical or average time to first success (sending first message) as claimed or measured by Customer.io?
uncertainties.impact: Without this, time_to_first_success cannot include a vendor-claimed value, limiting benchmarking.
uncertainties.evidence_needed: No explicit timing or duration claims found in official documentation or quick start guides.

uncertainties.question: Has the machine-drafted Customer.io route been independently shortest-path audited?
uncertainties.impact: Action counts and peer comparison must stay withheld until a human audit passes.
uncertainties.evidence_needed: Complete a shortest-path audit against current official docs and mark verified only when evidence supports it.
